title: PSP Event Summary
description: AI-generated structured summary of a Czech Parliament (PSP) event transcript. Field naming follows the Popolo / Legislature Data Standard where applicable.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Increment when fields are added or types change.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the summary was generated. Set by the script, not the LLM. (Popolo: created_at)

model_hint.description: Model identifier used to generate the summary. Set by the script, not the LLM.

event.description: Metadata about the parliamentary event, copied from the transcript header.

classification.description: Event category, e.g. Kulatý stůl, Seminář. (Popolo: classification)

end_date.description: ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM; null if unknown. (Popolo: end_date)

sources.description: URLs or local paths to source transcripts. (Popolo: sources)

video_parts.description: Ordered list of source video files used for deep-linking. Injected by the script from metadata, not the LLM.

part.description: 1-based part index matching transcript part numbers.

url.description: Full URL of the MP4 file on videoarchiv.psp.cz.

from_sec.description: Seconds into the file where content begins (pre-roll offset). Omitted if zero.

transcription.description: Technical metadata about the source transcript.

summary.description: Human-readable summary in Czech, stored as Markdown strings.

topic.description: Markdown — full text of the 'Téma a účel jednání' section.

main_points.description: Markdown — one item per speaker or thematic bullet from 'Hlavní body'.

outcome.description: Markdown — full text of 'Výsledek / závěr'; null if indeterminate.

notes.description: Markdown — transcript quality notes; null if none.

entities.description: Named entities extracted from the transcript.

speakers.description: Speakers identified in the transcript. (Popolo: person)

name.description: Display name as it appears in the transcript. (Popolo: name)

person_id.description: Popolo person.id if known; null otherwise.

affiliation.description: Party or institution name as free text.

parties.description: Political parties mentioned. (Popolo: organization with classification=party)

highlights.description: Short key statements (1 sentence) suitable for social media. Prefer hard facts and specific numbers.

text.description: The statement — direct quote or paraphrase, ~1 sentence.

type.description: Whether text is a direct quote or a paraphrase.

speaker.description: Speaker name, or null if unattributed.

affiliation.description: Party or institution, or null if unknown.

timestamp.description: Format: 'N/MM:SS' where N is the transcript part number and MM:SS is the nearest [MM:SS] marker in the text. Null if not determinable.

screenshot_path.description: Path to extracted video frame. Set by the script, not the LLM.

context.description: Brief factual context or fact-check note added by a second LLM pass. Null if not yet generated.

controversial.description: Controversial statements or proposals, each with attribution and reasoning.

statement.description: Markdown — what was said and why it is controversial.

speaker.description: Speaker name, or null if unattributed.

affiliation.description: Party or institution, or null if unknown.

timestamp.description: Format: 'N/MM:SS' — part number and nearest [MM:SS] marker. Null if not determinable.

screenshot_path.description: Path to extracted video frame. Set by the script, not the LLM.

context.description: Brief factual context or fact-check note added by a second LLM pass. Null if not yet generated.

quality.description: Assessment of transcript quality affecting summary reliability.

transcript_quality.description: good = reliable; partial = some gaps; poor = significant corruption.

unintelligible_parts.description: True if sections were too corrupted to summarise.

extras.description: Additional metadata not covered by the core schema. (Popolo: extras)
